title: Flourish Earthy Delight
description: An earthy and fluffy one-pot dish featuring phyllo dough with a dairy-free-friendly twist, perfect for breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add tomato sauce and oregano, stir well for an additional minute.
Fold the phyllo dough sheet into thirds lengthwise to form a tube.
Place spinach leaves inside each folded end of the phyllo dough tube. Fold over tightly, pressing edges with your fingers.
Carefully transfer the filled tube onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
